summary: Frontend end-to-end testing of Insight Networks Admin UI completed via Playwright against the preview URL. All 8 requested flows PASSED. Admin login, error handling for wrong creds, dashboard KPI rendering with real XceedNet data (Total=60, Online=35, Invoices=₹3,03,247.82, Tickets=4), quick-stats row, subscriber management with 50 rows and search, logout with token clearing, and marketing homepage regression all verified working.
action_items: MINOR (spec mismatch, not a bug): Review request expected logout to redirect to /admin-login, but AdminDashboard.jsx line 82 uses navigate('/dashboard') which routes to the marketing customer-portal page. Token is properly cleared. Consider changing to /admin-login for consistency if that's the intended UX.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.jsx: handleLogout navigates to '/dashboard' instead of '/admin-login'. Spec (and typical admin UX) expects logout to return to the admin login screen so the admin can log back in immediately.
AdminDashboard.jsx: 'Balance' column in the subscriber table always renders '—' (hardcoded). Either wire this to a subscriber balance field from the API or drop the column until data is available.

AdminDashboard.jsx: 'Add Subscriber', 'Edit', and 'Delete' action buttons in the Subscriber Management section have no onClick handlers — they are inert. Either implement them or mark as disabled/hidden to avoid misleading admins.
AdminLogin.jsx: The error banner has no data-testid — future tests need one (e.g., data-testid='login-error') to assert error messaging reliably.

xceednetApi.js: Uses non-standard header name 'Authentication' instead of 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'. Confirmed to work with the current backend proxy, but this is non-conventional and will trip up anyone integrating a standard HTTP client / API tooling.
AdminDashboard.jsx: Table rows lack data-testid (e.g. data-testid='subscriber-row-{id}'), making row-level automation brittle.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (8/8 requested features verified; 1 minor spec deviation in logout redirect target)

seed_data_creation: None. Read-only tests only — no subscribers, invoices, packages, or payments created/modified per constraints.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin login flow is fully working end-to-end against live XceedNet via backend proxy. Preview URL https://redirect-ai.preview.emergentagent.com/admin-login. Test data-testids: admin-login-page, admin-login-form, email-input, password-input, submit-login-button, admin-dashboard-page. Wrong creds surface error 'Couldn\'t find User' from XceedNet (styled in red banner) without data-testid. Dashboard loads KPIs from /api/admin/dashboard and 50 subscribers from /api/subscribers/list (XceedNet array-of-arrays response is correctly mapped to objects in AdminDashboard.jsx lines 41-60). Logout clears xceednet_token/user_type from localStorage and navigates to /dashboard (not /admin-login — see action_items). Marketing homepage regression verified: hero 'Smart Networks. Stronger Business. Better Tomorrow.' renders on 3 separate lines.

verified_flows.admin_dashboard_kpi_cards: PASS — Total Subscribers=60 (>0), Online=35, Invoices=₹3,03,247.82, Tickets=4
verified_flows.admin_dashboard_quick_stats: PASS — Registered/Expiring/Packages Sold/Pending Dues all visible
verified_flows.subscriber_management_section: PASS — search input visible, 50 subscriber rows rendered
verified_flows.logout_clears_token: PASS — localStorage.xceednet_token = null; note: redirects to /dashboard, not /admin-login
verified_flows.admin_login_wrong_credentials: PASS — stays on /admin-login, error 'Couldn\'t find User' displayed in red banner, 401 from backend
